title: Force-replace navbar logo text from 'GrowthBridge Media' to 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, locate every hardcoded string or JSX text node that renders 'GrowthBridge Media' (including any partial matches such as 'GrowthBridge' or 'Growth Bridge Media') and replace each one with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'. The navbar logo text visible in the top-left must read 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' at all viewport sizes and in both the transparent and scrolled/opaque background states.

quotes: see logo still is old one replace it
the screenshot clearly shows the navbar still reads 'GrowthBridge Media' instead of 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'

acceptanceCriteria: The navbar logo area displays 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' and not 'GrowthBridge Media' when the page first loads.
The navbar logo area displays 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' after the user scrolls down (scroll-triggered background change state).
No string 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' remains in Navbar.tsx.

requirements.text: Perform a full-codebase audit of all frontend source files (index.html, App.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, AccessDeniedScreen.tsx, AdminDashboard.tsx, and any other .tsx/.ts/.html file under the frontend directory) and replace every remaining occurrence of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'. This includes but is not limited to: the <title> tag in index.html, footer logo text, copyright line, hero section text, and the access-denied screen.

quotes: Replace every visible instance of 'GrowthBridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' throughout the entire frontend

acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'.
The footer logo/copyright reads 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'.
The AccessDeniedScreen renders 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' wherever the company name appears.
No user-facing text anywhere on the site displays 'GrowthBridge Media' or any variation.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui).
Do not alter any backend Motoko files.
Do not change layout, styling, colors, or any other component logic — only replace the company name strings.
nonGoals: Redesigning the navbar or any other section.
Adding new features or changing functionality.
Modifying backend data or canister logic.
